hero-tagline: Regulatory reporting specialist. Available for full-remote consulting mandates across Western Europe.
about-p1: I am a Business Analyst consultant specializing in Finance & Risk regulatory reporting. Currently on a mission within a major European automotive-leasing subsidiary of a banking group, I work on credit risk segmentation, Basel III Standard Approach frameworks, and NDoD regulatory reporting — primarily in Oracle SQL/PL-SQL.
about-p2: My background combines three years of data engineering apprenticeship in industrial BI (SQL Server, Power BI, XGBoost) with banking-side regulatory expertise acquired in production environments.
about-p3: I hold an engineering degree from Télécom Saint-Étienne and am currently pursuing the FRM certification (GARP).
about-p4: My consulting target: full-remote mandates for Western European clients in Finance, Risk, or regulatory data.
experience-1-title: Business Analyst — Finance & Risk Regulatory Reporting
experience-1-employer: Solutec — placed at a major European banking subsidiary (automotive leasing)
experience-1-bullet1: Oracle SQL/PL-SQL development for regulatory reporting production pipelines
experience-1-bullet2: Credit risk segmentation under Basel III Standard Approach
experience-1-bullet3: NDoD (New Definition of Default) framework implementation
experience-1-bullet4: Regulatory data quality controls and reconciliation
experience-2-bullet1: Industrial BI development: SQL Server/T-SQL, Power BI dashboards, ETL pipelines
experience-2-bullet3: Data pipeline automation and reporting for EMEA operations
projects-intro: Three projects in build — one per month. GitHub and live links will appear here as each one ships.
project-1-desc: A production-grade PL/SQL credit scoring engine built on Oracle XE, simulating a synthetic automotive leasing portfolio. Implements the Basel III Standard Approach for credit risk capital requirement calculation, including risk weight assignment, exposure segmentation, and RWA computation. Stored procedures, control tables, and reconciliation views included.
project-2-desc: A Power BI dashboard built on public EBA (European Banking Authority) data. Compares major European banks across key prudential ratios: CET1, Tier 1, LCR, NSFR. Designed to demonstrate regulatory data literacy and visual analytics skills in a Finance & Risk context. Downloadable .pbix file provided.
project-3-desc: An end-to-end credit scoring model built with XGBoost on a synthetic loan portfolio, featuring full SHAP explainability for individual predictions. The model is deployed as an interactive Streamlit application: input borrower characteristics and receive a risk score with a breakdown of contributing factors. Designed to bridge ML modelling with regulatory explainability requirements.
contact-blurb-1: Open to full-remote consulting mandates — Finance, Risk, regulatory data.
contact-blurb-2: Based in Bordeaux, France. Western European clients preferred.
